title: Drink Water, Cut Alcohol! Heat Warning for Portugal-Croatia Fans
description: Fans heading to watch Portugal play Croatia in the World Cup round of 32 in Toronto on Thursday are being warned to keep hydrated and limit their alcohol intake after a heat warning issued by Environment Canada.
content: Fans attending Portugal's World Cup clash with Croatia in Toronto have been urged to drink plenty of water, limit alcohol consumption and prepare for extreme heat and possible thunderstorms as temper… [+2759 chars]
de: Trinken Sie Wasser, verzichten Sie auf Alkohol! Hitzewarnung für Portugal-Kroatien-Fans. Fans, die am Donnerstag in Toronto das Spiel Portugal gegen Kroatien in der WM-Runde der letzten 32 verfolgen möchten, werden nach einer Hitzewarnung von Environment Canada gewarnt, ausreichend Flüssigkeit zu sich zu nehmen und ihren Alkoholkonsum einzuschränken.
en: Drink Water, Cut Alcohol! Heat Warning for Portugal-Croatia Fans. Fans heading to watch Portugal play Croatia in the World Cup round of 32 in Toronto on Thursday are being warned to keep hydrated and limit their alcohol intake after a heat warning issued by Environment Canada.
la: Bibe Aquam, Cut Vocatus! Calor Monitum pro Portugal-Croatia Fans. Fans spectatum spectat Portugallenses ludere Croatiae in World Cup circiter 32 in Toronto die Iovis admonentur ut hydratum custodiant et post caloris admonitionem ab Environment Canadae inclusam alcohole limitent.

title: IMD Weather Update: Yellow alert in Delhi-NCR as monsoon advances; thunderstorms alert in UP, Bihar, Rajasthan and other states
description: Delhi-NCR anticipates relief from heat with forecasts of light rain, thunderstorms, and gusty winds as the southwest monsoon advances. Several northern states, including Uttar Pradesh and Himachal Pradesh, are on alert for heavy rainfall and lightning.  Tempe…
content: IMD Weather Update Today: Delhi-NCR woke up to a cloudy and humid morning on Tuesday, raising hopes of relief from the intense heat that has gripped the region for days. The India Meteorological Depa… [+6891 chars]
de: IMD-Wetter-Update: Gelber Alarm in Delhi-NCR, da der Monsun voranschreitet; Gewitteralarm in UP, Bihar, Rajasthan und anderen Bundesstaaten. Delhi-NCR rechnet mit einer Linderung der Hitze mit Vorhersagen von leichtem Regen, Gewittern und böigen Winden, während der Südwestmonsun voranschreitet. Mehrere nördliche Bundesstaaten, darunter Uttar Pradesh und Himachal Pradesh, sind wegen starker Regenfälle und Blitze in Alarmbereitschaft.  Tempe…
en: IMD Weather Update: Yellow alert in Delhi-NCR as monsoon advances; thunderstorms alert in UP, Bihar, Rajasthan and other states. Delhi-NCR anticipates relief from heat with forecasts of light rain, thunderstorms, and gusty winds as the southwest monsoon advances. Several northern states, including Uttar Pradesh and Himachal Pradesh, are on alert for heavy rainfall and lightning.  Tempe…
la: IMD Tempestas Renovatio: Yellow erectus in Delhi-NCR sicut progressus monsoon; tonitribus excitati sunt in UP, Bihar, Rajasthan et in aliis civitatibus. Delhi-NCR anticipat subsidium caloris cum praenuntiationibus lucis pluviae, tonitruum, et ventorum procellosi sicut progressus inter meridiem et occasum solis. Plures civitates septentrionales, in iis Uttar Pradesh et Himachal Pradesh, in gravibus pluviis et fulminibus intenti sunt.  Tempe…
